errors.description: Required hardware trust roots reached deterministic consensus on the same governance evidence binding.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Only non-contradictory required hardware-root consensus may be considered reached.

errors.description: Hardware trust consensus failed because roots were missing, contradictory, degraded, or policy-mismatched.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Failed hardware consensus must not authorize governance actions.

errors.description: Hardware consensus contains software fallback or degraded hardware-root evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Degraded consensus cannot be treated as full hardware-backed trust.

errors.description: Hardware roots disagree on the governance evidence binding.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Contradictory hardware roots must block consensus.

errors.description: One or more required hardware roots are missing or not verified.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Missing required roots prevent deterministic hardware consensus.

errors.description: A hardware root is bound to a different policy hash than the expected governance policy.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Policy drift in hardware-root evidence must block consensus.
